items.title: One of Meta’s Offices Was Briefly Overtaken by a Rogue Squirrel
items.summary: The animal escaped after apparently arriving inside a package at Meta's Bangkok office, injuring one employee before finally being caught.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Volkswagen is employing 100 sheep at a solar farm in Poland
items.summary: It's more of a baa-ter arrangement.

items.title: Despite ‘misgivings,’ judge approves Elon Musk’s $1.5M SEC settlement
items.summary: The saga of Musk's tussle with the SEC over how he disclosed his growing stake in Twitter (now X) has come to an end.
